61970-302_Dynamics-AP-Con-Complex-SHACL

Shapes (3)​

  • http://iec.ch/TC57/ns/CIM/Dynamics/constraints/IEC61970-302/1.0#AsynchronousMachineEquivalentCircuit
  • http://iec.ch/TC57/ns/CIM/Dynamics/constraints/IEC61970-302/1.0#AsynchronousMachineUserDefined
  • http://iec.ch/TC57/ns/CIM/Dynamics/constraints/IEC61970-302/1.0#SynchronousMachineUserDefined

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim:AsynchronousMachineEquivalentCircuit
  • implicitClassTarget: http://iec.ch/TC57/ns/CIM/Dynamics/constraints/IEC61970-302/1.0#AsynchronousMachineEquivalentCircuit
  • targetClass: cim:AsynchronousMachineUserDefined
  • implicitClassTarget: http://iec.ch/TC57/ns/CIM/Dynamics/constraints/IEC61970-302/1.0#AsynchronousMachineUserDefined
  • targetClass: cim:SynchronousMachineUserDefined
  • implicitClassTarget: http://iec.ch/TC57/ns/CIM/Dynamics/constraints/IEC61970-302/1.0#SynchronousMachineUserDefined

Nested Properties:

Property​

  • cim:RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance

Direct-axis subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X''d) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans

Property​

  • cim:RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance

Quadrature-axis subtransient reactance (X''q) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans

Property​

  • cim:RotatingMachineDynamics.damping

Damping torque coefficient (D) (>= 0). A proportionality constant that, when multiplied by the angular velocity of the rotor poles with respect to the magnetic field (frequency), results in the damping torque. This value is often zero when the sources of damping torques (generator damper windings, load damping effects, etc.) are modelled in detail. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:RotatingMachineDynamics.statorResistance

Stator (armature) resistance (Rs) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,005.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance

Stator leakage reactance (Xl) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,15.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:RotatingMachineDynamics.saturationFactor

Saturation factor at rated terminal voltage (S1) (>= 0). Not used by simplified model. Defined by defined by S(E1) in the SynchronousMachineSaturationParameters diagram. Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:RotatingMachineDynamics.inertia

Inertia constant of generator or motor and mechanical load (H) (> 0). This is the specification for the stored energy in the rotating mass when operating at rated speed. For a generator, this includes the generator plus all other elements (turbine, exciter) on the same shaft and has units of MW x s. For a motor, it includes the motor plus its mechanical load. Conventional units are PU on the generator MVA base, usually expressed as MW x s / MVA or just s. This value is used in the accelerating power reference frame for operator training simulator solutions. Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance

Subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X'') (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp

Property​

  • cim:AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppo

Transient rotor time constant (T'o) (> AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppo). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpo."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpo

Property​

  • cim:AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppo

Subtransient rotor time constant (T''o) (> 0). Typical value = 0,03.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp

Transient reactance (unsaturated) (X') (>= AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp). Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xp."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanOrEqualsConstraintComponentPath: cim:AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xp

Property​

  • cim:RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance

Subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X'') (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp

Property​

  • cim:AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xp

Synchronous reactance (Xs) (>= AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xp). Typical value = 1,8.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xs."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanOrEqualsConstraintComponentPath: cim:AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xs

Shape​

  • http://iec.ch/TC57/ns/CIM/Dynamics/constraints/IEC61970-302/1.0#AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance

  • cim:RotatingMachineDynamics.inertia

Inertia constant of generator or motor and mechanical load (H) (> 0). This is the specification for the stored energy in the rotating mass when operating at rated speed. For a generator, this includes the generator plus all other elements (turbine, exciter) on the same shaft and has units of MW x s. For a motor, it includes the motor plus its mechanical load. Conventional units are PU on the generator MVA base, usually expressed as MW x s / MVA or just s. This value is used in the accelerating power reference frame for operator training simulator solutions. Typical value = 3.

Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, Ve2, back of commutating reactance (Se[Ve2]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,044.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC6A.th

Exciter field current limiter time constant (Th) (> 0). Typical value = 0,08.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC6A.ve1

Exciter alternator output voltages back of commutating reactance at which saturation is defined (Ve1) (> 0). Typical value = 7,4.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC6A.kh

Exciter field current limiter gain (Kh) (>= 0). Typical value = 92.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC6A.tc

Voltage regulator time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC6A.ka

Voltage regulator gain (Ka) (> 0). Typical value = 536.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC6A.ta

Voltage regulator time constant (Ta) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,086.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC6A.vrmin

Minimum voltage regulator output (Vrmin) (< 0). Typical value = -36.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC8B.ka

Voltage regulator gain (Ka) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC8B.kc

Rectifier loading factor proportional to commutating reactance (Kc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,55.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC8B.kd

Demagnetizing factor, a function of exciter alternator reactances (Kd) (>= 0). Typical value = 1,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC8B.kdr

Voltage regulator derivative gain (Kdr) (>= 0). Typical value = 10.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC8B.kir

Voltage regulator integral gain (Kir) (>= 0). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC8B.kpr

Voltage regulator proportional gain (Kpr) (> 0 if ExcAC8B.kir = 0). Typical value = 80.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value negative or zero when ExcAC8B.kir = 0."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:ExcAC8B.kir ?kir .
        FILTER (?kir=0 && ?value<=0) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC8B.seve1

Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, Ve1, back of commutating reactance (Se[Ve1]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC8B.seve2

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

  • cim:ExcAC8B.ta

Voltage regulator time constant (Ta) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

  • cim:ExcAC8B.tdr

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC8B.te

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC8B.vimin

Input signal minimum (Vimin) (< ExcAC8B.vimax). Typical value = -10.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcAC8B.vimax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:ExcAC8B.vimax

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC8B.vpidmin

PID minimum controller output (Vpidmin) (< ExcAC8B.vpidmax). Typical value = -10.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcAC8B.vpidmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:ExcAC8B.vpidmax

Property​

  • cim:ExcAC8B.vrmax

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        FILTER (?value=0) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:ExcBBC.t1

Controller time constant (T1) (>= 0). Typical value = 6.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcBBC.t2

Controller time constant (T2) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcBBC.t3

Lead/lag time constant (T3) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcBBC.t4

Lead/lag time constant (T4) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0,01.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcBBC.vrmin

Minimum control element output (Vrmin) (< ExcBBC.vrmax). Typical value = -5.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcBBC.vrmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:ExcBBC.vrmax

Property​

  • cim:ExcBBC.xe

Effective excitation transformer reactance (Xe) (>= 0). Xe models the regulation of the transformer/rectifier unit. Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcDC1A.efd2

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

  • cim:ExcDC1A.efdmin

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcDC1A.edfmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:ExcDC1A.edfmax

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcDC1A.seefd1

Property​

Messages:

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcDC1A.te

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcDC1A.vrmin

Constraints:

ComponentDetails

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcHU.imin

Major loop PI tag output signal lower limit (Imin) (< ExcHU.imax). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcBBC.vrmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails

Property​

  • cim:ExcIEEEAC3A.vamin

Property​

Exciter field current limiter gain (KH) (>= 0). Typical value = 92.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcIEEEAC6A.vamax

Maximum voltage regulator output (VAMAX) (> 0). Typical value = 75.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcIEEEAC6A.kd

Demagnetizing factor, a function of exciter alternator reactances (KD) (>= 0). Typical value = 1,91.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

  • cim:ExcIEEEAC6A.vrmax

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcIEEEAC6A.vhmax

ComponentDetails

Property​

Constraints:

  • cim:ExcIEEEAC7B.kp

Property​

  • cim:ExcIEEEAC7B.kpa

Voltage regulator proportional gain (KPA) (> 0 if ExcIEEEAC7B.kia = 0). Typical value = 65,36.

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value negative or zero when ExcIEEEAC7B.kia = 0."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:ExcIEEEAC7B.kia ?kia .
        FILTER (?kia=0 && ?value<=0) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:ExcIEEEAC7B.kpr

Voltage regulator proportional gain (KPR) (> 0 if ExcIEEEAC7B.kir = 0). Typical value = 4,24.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value negative or zero when ExcIEEEAC7B.kir = 0."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​

PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:ExcIEEEAC7B.kir ?kir .
        FILTER (?kir=0 && ?value<=0) .        
			}

Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:ExcIEEEDC4B.kd ?kd .
        FILTER (?kd>0 && ?value<=0) .        
			}

  • "The value is negative."

Property​

  • "The value is negative."

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcIEEEDC4B.vrmin

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcIEEEDC4B.vrmax; or positive."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MaxInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:ExcIEEEDC4B.vrmax

Property​

  • cim:ExcNI.r

rc / rfd (R) (>= 0). 0 means exciter has negative current capability

0 means exciter does not have negative current capability.
Typical value = 5.

ComponentDetails

Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (Tf1) (> 0). Typical value = 1,0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcNI.r

rc / rfd (R) (>= 0). 0 means exciter has negative current capability

0 means exciter does not have negative current capability.
Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcNI.tf2

Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (Tf2) (> 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcSEXS.kc

PI controller gain (Kc) (> 0 if ExcSEXS.tc > 0). Typical value = 0,08.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value negative or zero when ExcSEXS.tc > 0."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:ExcSEXS.tc ?tc .
        FILTER (?tc>0 && ?value<=0) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:ExcSEXS.tc

PI controller phase lead time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcSEXS.te

Time constant of gain block (Te) (> 0). Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

  • http://iec.ch/TC57/ns/CIM/Dynamics/constraints/IEC61970-302/1.0#ExcSEXS

  • cim:ExcSEXS.tc

PI controller phase lead time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcSEXS.tb

Denominator time constant of lag-lead block (Tb) (>= 0). Typical value = 10.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcSEXS.k

Gain (K) (> 0). Typical value = 100.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcSEXS.emin

Minimum field voltage output (Emin) (< ExcSEXS.emax). Typical value = -5.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcSEXS.emax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:ExcSEXS.emax

Property​

  • cim:ExcSEXS.efdmin

Field voltage clipping minimum limit (Efdmin) (< ExcSEXS.efdmax). Typical value = -5.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcSEXS.efdmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:ExcSEXS.efdmax

Property​

  • cim:ExcSEXS.kc

PI controller gain (Kc) (> 0 if ExcSEXS.tc > 0). Typical value = 0,08.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value negative or zero when ExcSEXS.tc > 0."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:ExcSEXS.tc ?tc .
        FILTER (?tc>0 && ?value<=0) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:ExcSK.efdmin

Field voltage clipping lower level limit (Efdmin) (< ExcSK.efdmax).

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcSK.efdmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:ExcSK.efdmax

Property​

  • cim:ExcSK.emin

Minimum field voltage output (Emin) (< ExcSK.emax). Typical value = -20.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcSK.emax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:ExcSK.emax

Property​

  • cim:ExcSK.sbase

Apparent power of the unit (Sbase) (> 0). Unit = MVA. Typical value = 259.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcSK.tc

PI controller phase lead time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 8.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcSK.te

Time constant of gain block (Te) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcSK.ti

PI controller phase lead time constant (Ti) (>= 0). Typical value = 2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcSK.tp

Time constant (Tp) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcSK.tr

Voltage transducer time constant (Tr) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,01.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:ExcSK.uimin

Minimum error (UImin) (< ExcSK.uimax). Typical value = -10.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcSK.uimax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:ExcSK.uimax

Property​

  • cim:ExcSK.urmin

Minimum controller output (URmin) (< ExcSK.urmax). Typical value = -10.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcSK.urmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:ExcSK.urmax

Property​

  • cim:ExcSK.vtmin

Minimum terminal voltage input (Vtmin) (< ExcSK.vtmax). Determines the range of voltage deadband. Typical value = 0,95.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcSK.vtmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:ExcSK.vtmax

Acceleration limiter time constant (Ta) (> 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovCT1.tact

Actuator time constant (Tact) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovCT1.tb

Turbine lag time constant (Tb) (> 0). Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Properties (2)​

  • cim:GovCT1.tc
  • cim:GovCT2.tc

Turbine lead time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Properties (2)​

  • cim:GovCT1.tdgov
  • cim:GovCT2.tdgov

Governor derivative controller time constant (Tdgov) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Properties (2)​

  • cim:GovCT1.teng
  • cim:GovCT2.teng

Transport time delay for diesel engine used in representing diesel engines where there is a small but measurable transport delay between a change in fuel flow setting and the development of torque (Teng) (>= 0). Teng should be zero in all but special cases where this transport delay is of particular concern. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovCT1.tfload

Load-limiter time constant (Tfload) (> 0). Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovCT1.tpelec

Electrical power transducer time constant (Tpelec) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovCT1.tsa

Temperature detection lead time constant (Tsa) (>= 0). Typical value = 4.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovCT1.tsb

Temperature detection lag time constant (Tsb) (>= 0). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovCT1.vmin

Minimum valve position limit (Vmin) (< GovCT1.vmax). Typical value = 0,15.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovCT1.vmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:GovCT1.vmax

  • cim:GovGAST.r

Permanent droop (R) (>0). Typical value = 0,04.

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Properties (2)​

  • cim:GovGAST.t1
  • cim:GovGAST1.t1

Governor mechanism time constant (T1) (>= 0). T1 represents the natural valve positioning time constant of the governor for small disturbances, as seen when rate limiting is not in effect. Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST.t2

Turbine power time constant (T2) (>= 0). T2 represents delay due to internal energy storage of the gas turbine engine. T2 can be used to give a rough approximation to the delay associated with acceleration of the compressor spool of a multi-shaft engine, or with the compressibility of gas in the plenum of a free power turbine of an aero-derivative unit, for example. Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST.t3

Turbine exhaust temperature time constant (T3) (>= 0). Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST.vmin

Minimum turbine power, PU of MWbase (Vmin) (< GovGAST.vmax). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovGAST.vmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:GovGAST.vmax

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST1.b

Turbine power time constant denominator scale factor (b) (>0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST1.r

Permanent droop (R) (>0). Typical value = 0,04.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST1.t2

Turbine power time constant (T2) (>= 0). T2 represents delay due to internal energy storage of the gas turbine engine. T2 can be used to give a rough approximation to the delay associated with acceleration of the compressor spool of a multi-shaft engine, or with the compressibility of gas in the plenum of the free power turbine of an aero-derivative unit, for example. Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST1.t3

Turbine exhaust temperature time constant (T3) (>= 0). T3 represents delay in the exhaust temperature and load limiting system. Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST1.t4

Governor lead time constant (T4) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST1.t5

Governor lag time constant (T5) (>= 0). If = 0, entire gain and lead-lag block is bypassed. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST1.tltr

Valve position averaging time constant (Tltr) (>= 0). Typical value = 10.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST1.vmin

Minimum turbine power, PU of MWbase (Vmin) (< GovGAST1.vmax). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovGAST1.vmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:GovGAST1.vmax

Nested Properties:

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST.vmin

Minimum turbine power, PU of MWbase (Vmin) (< GovGAST.vmax). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovGAST.vmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:GovGAST.vmax

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST.t3

Turbine exhaust temperature time constant (T3) (>= 0). Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST.t2

Turbine power time constant (T2) (>= 0). T2 represents delay due to internal energy storage of the gas turbine engine. T2 can be used to give a rough approximation to the delay associated with acceleration of the compressor spool of a multi-shaft engine, or with the compressibility of gas in the plenum of a free power turbine of an aero-derivative unit, for example. Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST.t1

Governor mechanism time constant (T1) (>= 0). T1 represents the natural valve positioning time constant of the governor for small disturbances, as seen when rate limiting is not in effect. Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST.r

Permanent droop (R) (>0). Typical value = 0,04.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovGAST.mwbase

Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

(Kdroop) (>= 0).

Water inertia time constant (Tw) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Shape​

  • http://iec.ch/TC57/ns/CIM/Dynamics/constraints/IEC61970-302/1.0#GovHydro3

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim:GovHydro3
  • implicitClassTarget: http://iec.ch/TC57/ns/CIM/Dynamics/constraints/IEC61970-302/1.0#GovHydro3

Nested Properties:

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro3.tw

Water inertia time constant (Tw) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro3.at

Turbine gain (At) (>0). Typical value = 1,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro3.mwbase

Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro3.pmin

Minimum gate opening, PU of MWbase (Pmin) (< GovHydro3.pmax). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovHydro3.pmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:GovHydro3.pmax

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro3.tp

Gate servo time constant (Tp) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro3.tf

Washout time constant (Tf) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro3.td

Input filter time constant (Td) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro3.tt

Power feedback time constant (Tt) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.bgv0

Kaplan blade servo point 0 (Bgv0) (= 0 for simple, = 0 for Francis/Pelton). Typical value for Kaplan = 0.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple or francisPelton."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton) && ?value!=0) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.bgv1

Kaplan blade servo point 1 (Bgv1) (= 0 for simple, = 0 for Francis/Pelton). Typical value for Kaplan = 0.

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple or francisPelton."]

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton) && ?value!=0) .        
			}

  • cim:GovHydro4.bgv2

  • cim:GovHydro4.bgv4

PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>

        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton) && ?value!=0) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.bgv5

Kaplan blade servo point 5 (Bgv5) (= 0 for simple, = 0 for Francis/Pelton). Typical value for Kaplan = 1.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple or francisPelton."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton) && ?value!=0) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.bmax

Maximum blade adjustment factor (Bmax) (= 0 for simple, = 0 for Francis/Pelton). Typical value for Kaplan = 1,1276.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple or francisPelton."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton) && ?value!=0) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.gmin

Minimum gate opening, PU of MWbase (Gmin) (< GovHydro4.gmax). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovHydro4.gmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:GovHydro4.gmax

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.gv0

Nonlinear gain point 0, PU gv (Gv0) (= 0 for simple). Typical for Francis/Pelton = 0,1, Kaplan = 0,1.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        FILTER (?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple && ?value!=0) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.gv1

Nonlinear gain point 1, PU gv (Gv1) (= 0 for simple, > GovHydro4.gv0 for Francis/Pelton and Kaplan). Typical value for Francis/Pelton = 0,4, Kaplan = 0,4.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple or it is not greater than GovHydro4.gv0 when GovHydro4.model is francisPelton or kaplan."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.gv0 ?gv0 .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple && ?value!=0) || ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.kaplan) && ?value<=?gv0)) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.gv2

Nonlinear gain point 2, PU gv (Gv2) (= 0 for simple, > GovHydro4.gv1 for Francis/Pelton and Kaplan). Typical value for Francis/Pelton = 0,5, Kaplan = 0,5.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple or it is not greater than GovHydro4.gv1 when GovHydro4.model is francisPelton or kaplan."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.gv1 ?gv1 .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple && ?value!=0) || ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.kaplan) && ?value<=?gv1)) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.gv3

Nonlinear gain point 3, PU gv (Gv3) (= 0 for simple, > GovHydro4.gv2 for Francis/Pelton and Kaplan). Typical value for Francis/Pelton = 0,7, Kaplan = 0,7.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple or it is not greater than GovHydro4.gv2 when GovHydro4.model is francisPelton or kaplan."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.gv2 ?gv2 .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple && ?value!=0) || ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.kaplan) && ?value<=?gv2)) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.gv4

Nonlinear gain point 4, PU gv (Gv4) (= 0 for simple, > GovHydro4.gv3 for Francis/Pelton and Kaplan). Typical value for Francis/Pelton = 0,8, Kaplan = 0,8.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple or it is not greater than GovHydro4.gv3 when GovHydro4.model is francisPelton or kaplan."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.gv3 ?gv3 .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple && ?value!=0) || ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.kaplan) && ?value<=?gv3)) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.gv5

Nonlinear gain point 5, PU gv (Gv5) (= 0 for simple, < 1 and > GovHydro4.gv4 for Francis/Pelton and Kaplan). Typical value for Francis/Pelton = 0,9, Kaplan = 0,9.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple or it is either not greater than GovHydro4.gv4 or it is not less than 1 when GovHydro4.model is francisPelton or kaplan."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.gv4 ?gv4 .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple && ?value!=0) || ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.kaplan) && ?value<=?gv4 && ?value>=1)) .        
			}

Property​

Nonlinear gain point 0, PU power (Pgv0) (= 0 for simple). Typical value = 0.

sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple."]

        FILTER (?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple && ?value!=0) .        
			}

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        FILTER (?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple && ?value!=0) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.gmin

Minimum gate opening, PU of MWbase (Gmin) (< GovHydro4.gmax). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovHydro4.gmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:GovHydro4.gmax

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.bgv4

Kaplan blade servo point 4 (Bgv4) (= 0 for simple, = 0 for Francis/Pelton). Typical value for Kaplan = 0,9.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple or francisPelton."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton) && ?value!=0) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.gv1

Nonlinear gain point 1, PU gv (Gv1) (= 0 for simple, > GovHydro4.gv0 for Francis/Pelton and Kaplan). Typical value for Francis/Pelton = 0,4, Kaplan = 0,4.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple or it is not greater than GovHydro4.gv0 when GovHydro4.model is francisPelton or kaplan."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.gv0 ?gv0 .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple && ?value!=0) || ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.kaplan) && ?value<=?gv0)) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.gv5

Nonlinear gain point 5, PU gv (Gv5) (= 0 for simple, < 1 and > GovHydro4.gv4 for Francis/Pelton and Kaplan). Typical value for Francis/Pelton = 0,9, Kaplan = 0,9.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple or it is either not greater than GovHydro4.gv4 or it is not less than 1 when GovHydro4.model is francisPelton or kaplan."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.gv4 ?gv4 .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple && ?value!=0) || ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.kaplan) && ?value<=?gv4 && ?value>=1)) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.pgv0

Nonlinear gain point 0, PU power (Pgv0) (= 0 for simple). Typical value = 0.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        FILTER (?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple && ?value!=0) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.pgv3

Nonlinear gain point 3, PU power (Pgv3) (= 0 for simple). Typical value for Francis/Pelton = 0,8, Kaplan = 0,796.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        FILTER (?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple && ?value!=0) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.tblade

Blade servo time constant (Tblade) (>= 0). Typical value = 100.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.tw

Water inertia time constant (Tw) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.tp

Pilot servo time constant (Tp) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.gv2

Nonlinear gain point 2, PU gv (Gv2) (= 0 for simple, > GovHydro4.gv1 for Francis/Pelton and Kaplan). Typical value for Francis/Pelton = 0,5, Kaplan = 0,5.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple or it is not greater than GovHydro4.gv1 when GovHydro4.model is francisPelton or kaplan."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.gv1 ?gv1 .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple && ?value!=0) || ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.kaplan) && ?value<=?gv1)) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.gv3

Nonlinear gain point 3, PU gv (Gv3) (= 0 for simple, > GovHydro4.gv2 for Francis/Pelton and Kaplan). Typical value for Francis/Pelton = 0,7, Kaplan = 0,7.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple or it is not greater than GovHydro4.gv2 when GovHydro4.model is francisPelton or kaplan."]

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.gv2 ?gv2 .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple && ?value!=0) || ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.kaplan) && ?value<=?gv2)) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:GovHydro4.gv4

Nonlinear gain point 4, PU gv (Gv4) (= 0 for simple, > GovHydro4.gv3 for Francis/Pelton and Kaplan). Typical value for Francis/Pelton = 0,8, Kaplan = 0,8.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The value is not 0 when GovHydro4.model is simple or it is not greater than GovHydro4.gv3 when GovHydro4.model is francisPelton or kaplan."]

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>

PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.model ?model .
        $this cim:GovHydro4.gv3 ?gv3 .
        FILTER ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.simple && ?value!=0) || ((?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.francisPelton || ?model=cim:GovHydro4ModelKind.kaplan) && ?value<=?gv3)) .        
			}

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovHydroWEH.gmin

Minimum gate position (Gmin) (< GovHydroWEH.gmax).

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovHydroWEH.gmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:GovHydroWEH.gmax

Property​

  • cim:GovHydroWEH.tp

Pilot valve time lag time constant (Tp) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovHydroWEH.td

Derivative controller time constant (Td) (>= 0). Limits the derivative characteristic beyond a breakdown frequency to avoid amplification of high-frequency noise.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovHydroWEH.tg

Value to allow the distribution valve controller to advance beyond the gate movement rate limit (Tg) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovHydroWEH.tw

Water inertia time constant (Tw) (> 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        FILTER (?value<0) .        
			}

  • cim:GovSteamIEEE1.uo

Maximum valve opening velocity (Uo) (> 0). Unit = PU / s. Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovSteamIEEE1.mwbase

Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovSteamIEEE1.t6

Time constant of third boiler pass (T6) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovSteamIEEE1.t4

Inlet piping/steam bowl time constant (T4) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovSteamIEEE1.t3

Valve positioner time constant (T3) (> 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovSteamIEEE1.uc

Maximum valve closing velocity (Uc) (< 0). Unit = PU / s. Typical value = -10.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovSteamIEEE1.k

Governor gain (reciprocal of droop) (K) (> 0). Typical value = 25.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovSteamIEEE1.t7

Time constant of fourth boiler pass (T7) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovSteamIEEE1.t5

Time constant of second boiler pass (T5) (>= 0). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovSteamIEEE1.t2

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:GovSteamIEEE1.pmin

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovSteamIEEE1.pmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:GovSteamIEEE1.pmax

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

  • cim:GovSteamSGO.pmin

ComponentDetails

Property​

  • cim:LoadStatic.staticLoadModelType

The load is represented as a constant impedance. ConstantZ equations are used for active and reactive power and no attributes are required.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The load is represented as a constant impedance but other properties (attributes) are defined."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp1 ?kp1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp2 ?kp2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp3 ?kp3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp4 ?kp4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kpf ?kpf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq1 ?kq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq2 ?kq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq3 ?kq3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq4 ?kq4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kqf ?kqf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep1 ?ep1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep2 ?ep2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep3 ?ep3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq1 ?eq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq2 ?eq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq3 ?eq3} .
        FILTER ((bound(?kp1) || bound(?kp2) || bound(?kp3) || bound(?kp4) || bound(?kpf) || bound(?kq1) || bound(?kq2) || bound(?kq3) || bound(?kq4) || bound(?kqf) || bound(?ep1) || bound(?ep2) || bound(?ep3) || bound(?eq1) || bound(?eq2) || bound(?eq3)) && ?value=cim:StaticLoadModelKind.constantZ) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:LoadStatic.staticLoadModelType

This model is an exponential representation of the load. Exponential equations for active and reactive power are used and the following attributes are required: kp1, kp2, kp3, kpf, ep1, ep2, ep3, kq1, kq2, kq3, kqf, eq1, eq2, eq3.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["Required properties (attributes) for exponential model type are not defined or there are unnecessary properties defined."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp1 ?kp1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp2 ?kp2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp3 ?kp3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp4 ?kp4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kpf ?kpf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq1 ?kq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq2 ?kq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq3 ?kq3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq4 ?kq4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kqf ?kqf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep1 ?ep1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep2 ?ep2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep3 ?ep3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq1 ?eq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq2 ?eq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq3 ?eq3} .
        FILTER (((!bound(?kp1) || !bound(?kp2) || !bound(?kp3) || !bound(?kpf) || !bound(?kq1) || !bound(?kq2) || !bound(?kq3) || !bound(?kqf) || !bound(?ep1) || !bound(?ep2) || !bound(?ep3) || !bound(?eq1) || !bound(?eq2) || !bound(?eq3)) && ?value=cim:StaticLoadModelKind.exponential) || ((bound(?kp4) || bound(?kq4)) && ?value=cim:StaticLoadModelKind.exponential)) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:LoadStatic.staticLoadModelType

This model integrates the frequency-dependent load (primarily motors). ZIP1 equations for active and reactive power are used and the following attributes are required: kp1, kp2, kp3, kpf, kq1, kq2, kq3, kqf.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["Required properties (attributes) for zIP1 model type are not defined or there are unnecessary properties defined."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp1 ?kp1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp2 ?kp2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp3 ?kp3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp4 ?kp4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kpf ?kpf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq1 ?kq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq2 ?kq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq3 ?kq3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq4 ?kq4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kqf ?kqf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep1 ?ep1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep2 ?ep2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep3 ?ep3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq1 ?eq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq2 ?eq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq3 ?eq3} .
        FILTER (((!bound(?kp1) || !bound(?kp2) || !bound(?kp3) || !bound(?kpf) || !bound(?kq1) || !bound(?kq2) || !bound(?kq3) || !bound(?kqf) ) && ?value=cim:StaticLoadModelKind.zIP1) || (?value=cim:StaticLoadModelKind.zIP1 && (bound(?ep1) || bound(?ep2) || bound(?ep3) || bound(?eq1) || bound(?eq2) || bound(?eq3) || bound(?kp4) || bound(?kq4)))) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:LoadStatic.staticLoadModelType

This model separates the frequency-dependent load (primarily motors) from other load. ZIP2 equations for active and reactive power are used and the following attributes are required: kp1, kp2, kp3, kq4, kpf, kq1, kq2, kq3, kq4, kqf.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["Required properties (attributes) for zIP2 model type are not defined or there are unnecessary properties defined."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp1 ?kp1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp2 ?kp2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp3 ?kp3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp4 ?kp4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kpf ?kpf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq1 ?kq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq2 ?kq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq3 ?kq3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq4 ?kq4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kqf ?kqf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep1 ?ep1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep2 ?ep2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep3 ?ep3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq1 ?eq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq2 ?eq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq3 ?eq3} .
        FILTER (((!bound(?kp1) || !bound(?kp2) || !bound(?kp3) || !bound(?kp4) || !bound(?kpf) || !bound(?kq1) || !bound(?kq2) || !bound(?kq3) || !bound(?kq4) || !bound(?kqf) ) && ?value=cim:StaticLoadModelKind.zIP2) || (?value=cim:StaticLoadModelKind.zIP2 && (bound(?ep1) || bound(?ep2) || bound(?ep3) || bound(?eq1) || bound(?eq2) || bound(?eq3)))) .        
			}

Shape​

  • http://iec.ch/TC57/ns/CIM/Dynamics/constraints/IEC61970-302/1.0#LoadStatic

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim:LoadStatic
  • implicitClassTarget: http://iec.ch/TC57/ns/CIM/Dynamics/constraints/IEC61970-302/1.0#LoadStatic

Property​

  • cim:LoadStatic.staticLoadModelType

This model is an exponential representation of the load. Exponential equations for active and reactive power are used and the following attributes are required: kp1, kp2, kp3, kpf, ep1, ep2, ep3, kq1, kq2, kq3, kqf, eq1, eq2, eq3.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["Required properties (attributes) for exponential model type are not defined or there are unnecessary properties defined."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp1 ?kp1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp2 ?kp2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp3 ?kp3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp4 ?kp4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kpf ?kpf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq1 ?kq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq2 ?kq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq3 ?kq3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq4 ?kq4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kqf ?kqf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep1 ?ep1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep2 ?ep2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep3 ?ep3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq1 ?eq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq2 ?eq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq3 ?eq3} .
        FILTER (((!bound(?kp1) || !bound(?kp2) || !bound(?kp3) || !bound(?kpf) || !bound(?kq1) || !bound(?kq2) || !bound(?kq3) || !bound(?kqf) || !bound(?ep1) || !bound(?ep2) || !bound(?ep3) || !bound(?eq1) || !bound(?eq2) || !bound(?eq3)) && ?value=cim:StaticLoadModelKind.exponential) || ((bound(?kp4) || bound(?kq4)) && ?value=cim:StaticLoadModelKind.exponential)) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:LoadStatic.staticLoadModelType

This model integrates the frequency-dependent load (primarily motors). ZIP1 equations for active and reactive power are used and the following attributes are required: kp1, kp2, kp3, kpf, kq1, kq2, kq3, kqf.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["Required properties (attributes) for zIP1 model type are not defined or there are unnecessary properties defined."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp1 ?kp1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp2 ?kp2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp3 ?kp3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp4 ?kp4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kpf ?kpf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq1 ?kq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq2 ?kq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq3 ?kq3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq4 ?kq4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kqf ?kqf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep1 ?ep1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep2 ?ep2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep3 ?ep3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq1 ?eq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq2 ?eq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq3 ?eq3} .
        FILTER (((!bound(?kp1) || !bound(?kp2) || !bound(?kp3) || !bound(?kpf) || !bound(?kq1) || !bound(?kq2) || !bound(?kq3) || !bound(?kqf) ) && ?value=cim:StaticLoadModelKind.zIP1) || (?value=cim:StaticLoadModelKind.zIP1 && (bound(?ep1) || bound(?ep2) || bound(?ep3) || bound(?eq1) || bound(?eq2) || bound(?eq3) || bound(?kp4) || bound(?kq4)))) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:LoadStatic.staticLoadModelType

This model separates the frequency-dependent load (primarily motors) from other load. ZIP2 equations for active and reactive power are used and the following attributes are required: kp1, kp2, kp3, kq4, kpf, kq1, kq2, kq3, kq4, kqf.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["Required properties (attributes) for zIP2 model type are not defined or there are unnecessary properties defined."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp1 ?kp1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp2 ?kp2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp3 ?kp3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp4 ?kp4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kpf ?kpf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq1 ?kq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq2 ?kq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq3 ?kq3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq4 ?kq4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kqf ?kqf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep1 ?ep1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep2 ?ep2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep3 ?ep3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq1 ?eq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq2 ?eq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq3 ?eq3} .
        FILTER (((!bound(?kp1) || !bound(?kp2) || !bound(?kp3) || !bound(?kp4) || !bound(?kpf) || !bound(?kq1) || !bound(?kq2) || !bound(?kq3) || !bound(?kq4) || !bound(?kqf) ) && ?value=cim:StaticLoadModelKind.zIP2) || (?value=cim:StaticLoadModelKind.zIP2 && (bound(?ep1) || bound(?ep2) || bound(?ep3) || bound(?eq1) || bound(?eq2) || bound(?eq3)))) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:LoadStatic.staticLoadModelType

The load is represented as a constant impedance. ConstantZ equations are used for active and reactive power and no attributes are required.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["The load is represented as a constant impedance but other properties (attributes) are defined."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp1 ?kp1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp2 ?kp2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp3 ?kp3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kp4 ?kp4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kpf ?kpf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq1 ?kq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq2 ?kq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq3 ?kq3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kq4 ?kq4} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.kqf ?kqf} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep1 ?ep1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep2 ?ep2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.ep3 ?ep3} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq1 ?eq1} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq2 ?eq2} .
          OPTIONAL {$this cim:LoadStatic.eq3 ?eq3} .
        FILTER ((bound(?kp1) || bound(?kp2) || bound(?kp3) || bound(?kp4) || bound(?kpf) || bound(?kq1) || bound(?kq2) || bound(?kq3) || bound(?kq4) || bound(?kqf) || bound(?ep1) || bound(?ep2) || bound(?ep3) || bound(?eq1) || bound(?eq2) || bound(?eq3)) && ?value=cim:StaticLoadModelKind.constantZ) .        
			}

Shape​

  • http://iec.ch/TC57/ns/CIM/Dynamics/constraints/IEC61970-302/1.0#MechanicalLoadDynamics

MechanicalLoadDynamics shall have either an association to SynchronousMachineDynamics or to AsynchronousMachineDynamics.

Messages:

  • "Required association to either SynchronousMachineDynamics or to AsynchronousMachineDynamics is missing."

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim:MechanicalLoadUserDefined
  • targetClass: cim:MechLoad1
  • implicitClassTarget: http://iec.ch/TC57/ns/CIM/Dynamics/constraints/IEC61970-302/1.0#MechanicalLoadDynamics

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:XoneConstraintComponentShapes: [N8026dbb904204daab2f200a27826dccc, Nd4566d2c337c45f4a9623d762ef00d40]

Property​

  • cim:OverexcLim2.voimin

Minimum error signal (VOIMIN) (< OverexcLim2.voimax). Typical value = -9999.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than OverexcLim2.voimax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:OverexcLim2.voimax

Shape​

  • http://iec.ch/TC57/ns/CIM/Dynamics/constraints/IEC61970-302/1.0#OverexcLim2

Targets:

Nested Properties:

Property​

  • cim:OverexcLim2.voimin

Minimum error signal (VOIMIN) (< OverexcLim2.voimax). Typical value = -9999.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than OverexcLim2.voimax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:OverexcLim2.voimax

Property​

  • cim:OverexcLimX1.t1

Time to trip the exciter at the low voltage point on the inverse time characteristic (TIME1) (>= 0). Typical value = 120.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:OverexcLimX1.t2

Time to trip the exciter at the mid voltage point on the inverse time characteristic (TIME2) (>= 0). Typical value = 40.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:OverexcLimX1.t3

Time to trip the exciter at the high voltage point on the inverse time characteristic (TIME3) (>= 0). Typical value = 15.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Properties (2)​

  • cim:OverexcLimX1.vlow

Low voltage limit (VLOW) (> 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:Pss2ST.inputSignal1Type

shall be different than Pss2ST.inputSignal2Type.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["Input signal #1 and input signal #2 are not different."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:Pss2ST.inputSignal2Type ?input2 .
        FILTER (?value=?input2) .        
			}

Properties (2)​

  • cim:Pss2ST.inputSignal1Type
  • cim:PssWECC.inputSignal1Type

Type of input signal #1 (rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, busFrequencyDeviation, generatorElectricalPower, generatorAcceleratingPower, busVoltage, or busVoltageDerivative). Typical value = rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation.

Messages:

  • "Not allowed value for input signal #1."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:InConstraintComponentValues: [cim:InputSignalKind.busVoltage, cim:InputSignalKind.generatorElectricalPower, cim:InputSignalKind.generatorAcceleratingPower, cim:InputSignalKind.busVoltageDerivative, cim:InputSignalKind.rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, cim:InputSignalKind.busFrequencyDeviation]

Property​

  • cim:Pss2ST.inputSignal2Type

Type of input signal #2 (rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, busFrequencyDeviation, generatorElectricalPower, generatorAcceleratingPower, busVoltage, or busVoltageDerivative - shall be different than Pss2ST.inputSignal1Type). Typical value = busVoltageDerivative.

Messages:

  • "Not allowed value for input signal #2."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:InConstraintComponentValues: [cim:InputSignalKind.busVoltage, cim:InputSignalKind.generatorElectricalPower, cim:InputSignalKind.generatorAcceleratingPower, cim:InputSignalKind.busVoltageDerivative, cim:InputSignalKind.rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, cim:InputSignalKind.busFrequencyDeviation]

Property​

Limiter (LSMIN) (< Pss2ST.lsmax).

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than Pss2ST.lsmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:Pss2ST.lsmax

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than PssIEEE4V.vhmax."

sh:LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim:PssIEEE4V.vhmax

Property​

  • cim:PssWECC.inputSignal1Type

shall be different than PssWECC.inputSignal2Type.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:SPARQLConstraintComponentMessages: ["Input signal #1 and input signal #2 are not different."]
Query: See SPARQL-1 below

SPARQL Queries​

SPARQL-1​
PREFIX cim: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX eu: <http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100-European#>

			SELECT $this ?value
			WHERE {
        $this $PATH ?value .
        $this cim:PssWECC.inputSignal2Type ?input2 .
        FILTER (?value=?input2) .        
			}

Property​

  • cim:PssWECC.inputSignal2Type

Type of input signal #2 (rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, busFrequencyDeviation, generatorElectricalPower, generatorAcceleratingPower, busVoltage, busVoltageDerivative - shall be different than PssWECC.inputSignal1Type). Typical value = busVoltageDerivative.

Messages:

  • "Not allowed value for input signal #2."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:InConstraintComponentValues: [cim:InputSignalKind.busVoltage, cim:InputSignalKind.generatorElectricalPower, cim:InputSignalKind.generatorAcceleratingPower, cim:InputSignalKind.busVoltageDerivative, cim:InputSignalKind.rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, cim:InputSignalKind.busFrequencyDeviation]

Property​

  • cim:PssWECC.t1

Input signal 1 transducer time constant (T1) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,037.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:PssWECC.t10

Lag time constant (T10) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:PssWECC.t2

Input signal 2 transducer time constant (T2) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

  • cim:PssWECC.t3

Stabilizer washout time constant (T3) (>= 0). Typical value = 9,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Property​

Stabilizer washout time lag constant (T4) (>= 0). Typical value = 9,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

  • cim:PssWECC.t5

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

sh:MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

  • cim:PssWECC.inputSignal1Type

Messages:

  • "Not allowed value for input signal #1."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails

Property​

  • cim:PssWECC.inputSignal2Type

Type of input signal #2 (rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, busFrequencyDeviation, generatorElectricalPower, generatorAcceleratingPower, busVoltage, busVoltageDerivative - shall be different than PssWECC.inputSignal1Type). Typical value = busVoltageDerivative.

Messages:

  • "Not allowed value for input signal #2."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh:InConstraintComponentValues: [cim:InputSignalKind.busVoltage, cim:InputSignalKind.generatorElectricalPower, cim:InputSignalKind.generatorAcceleratingPower, cim:InputSignalKind.busVoltageDerivative, cim:InputSignalKind.rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, cim:InputSignalKind.busFrequencyDeviation]

Property​

  • cim:PssWECC.inputSignal1Type

shall be different than PssWECC.inputSignal2Type.
